source_section: ## Narrative Arc / ### A Dance with Dragons[ ]
snippet: Headless Jeyne accompanies the rest of the Iron Fleet when they sail for [LINK] . It arrives at the rendezvous at the [Isle of Cedars](wiki:Isle_of_Cedars)...
